query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `self_discovery_history` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `conversation_id` int NOT NULL,
  `trigger_message_id` int,
  `last_user_query` text,
  `last_ai_response` text,
  `generated_query` text NOT NULL,
  `direction` enum('deeper','broader','applied') NOT NULL,
  `layer_context` varchar(32),
  `proficiency_level` varchar(32),
  `feature_context` json,
  `status` enum('generated','sent','dismissed','completed') DEFAULT 'generated',
  `user_engaged` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

ALTER TABLE `user_preferences` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `discoveryDirection` enum('deeper','broader','applied','auto') DEFAULT 'auto';
ALTER TABLE `user_preferences` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `discoveryIdleThresholdMs` int DEFAULT 120000;
ALTER TABLE `user_preferences` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `discoveryContinuous` boolean DEFAULT false;
